description: Train a Neural Network regression model to predict abalone age using the dataset from https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/machine-learning-databases/abalone/abalone.data. Save the data to ~/Documents/JASP/abalone.csv with the following headers: 'Sex', 'Length', 'Diameter', 'Height', 'Whole_weight', 'Shucked_weight', 'Viscera_weight', 'Shell_weight', 'Rings'. Configure the regression model with 'Rings' as the target and all other variables as predictors, using an 80/20 training/test split and a seed of 123. The neural network architecture must consist of two hidden layers with 8 nodes in the first layer and 4 nodes in the second. Save the JASP project to ~/Documents/JASP/Abalone_NeuralNet.jasp and record the Test MSE value in ~/Documents/JASP/abalone_performance.txt.
